name: io.github.lithacker6458/metaculus
title: Metaculus
description: Browse Metaculus forecasting questions, submit and withdraw forecasts (binary, multiple-choice, and continuous via an automatic percentile-to-CDF builder), post rationale comments, and pull CSV score/forecast exports. Bring your own free Metaculus API token; the server stores nothing.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Your Metaculus API token in the format 'Token <token>' (generate one free at https://www.metaculus.com/accounts/settings/account/#api-access). 'Bearer <token>' and an 'X-Metaculus-Token' header are also accepted.
